title: Galaxy Research Cuts CLARITY Act Passage Odds to 50-50 as Senate Clock Runs Out
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Galaxy Research Cuts CLARITY Act Passage Odds to 50-50 as Senate Clock Runs Out

Galaxy Research cut its odds of the Senate passing the CLARITY Act to 50-50, citing dwindling time before Congress's August recess and mounting legislative uncertainty.

This post Galaxy Research Cuts CLARITY Act Passage Odds to 50-50 as Senate Clock Runs Out first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Billionaire Investor Jeremy Grantham: Bitcoin Will ‘Dwindle Away With a Whimper’
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Billionaire Investor Jeremy Grantham: Bitcoin Will ‘Dwindle Away With a Whimper’

Jeremy Grantham doubled down on his long-standing Bitcoin skepticism, predicting the cryptocurrency will "dwindle away with a whimper."

This post Billionaire Investor Jeremy Grantham: Bitcoin Will ‘Dwindle Away With a Whimper’ first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: ‘I See Volatility as Opportunity’: Bitcoin Tests Critical Support as Key Level Hangs in the Balance
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

‘I See Volatility as Opportunity’: Bitcoin Tests Critical Support as Key Level Hangs in the Balance

Bitcoin is testing the critical $58,000–$60,000 support zone for a third time, with a break below could trigger a deeper decline.

This post ‘I See Volatility as Opportunity’: Bitcoin Tests Critical Support as Key Level Hangs in the Balance first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.
